title: Arai Chaser X

specs.material: Multi-composite shell with Arai's proprietary EPS liner

technical_analysis: The Arai Chaser X utilizes a multi-composite shell construction that balances rigidity with impact absorption, ensuring superior protection without excessive weight. The internal EPS liner is engineered to meet the latest ECE 22.06 standards, providing optimized energy dispersion during high-velocity impacts while maintaining a comfortable fit for extended rides. Its aerodynamic profile minimizes drag at highway speeds, reducing rider fatigue and enhancing stability in crosswinds.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of performance and comfort with the Arai Chaser X, designed for riders who demand excellence on every mile. Featuring Arai's renowned safety technology and a sleek, modern aesthetic, this helmet offers an unparalleled riding experience that keeps you protected without compromising on style or airflow.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Arai Chaser X full-face helmet. Engineered with multi-composite shells, ECE 22.06 certification, and superior ventilation for ultimate safety and comfort at high speeds.
